prediction.chief_complaint: smoking cessation counseling, pack-a-day for 25 years

medications.name: varenicline
medications.frequency: once daily days 1-3, then 0.5 mg twice daily days 4-7, then 1 mg twice daily from day 8 onward for total 12 weeks

plan: varenicline 0.5 mg once daily days 1-3, then 0.5 mg twice daily days 4-7, then 1 mg twice daily from day 8 onward for 12 weeks total, starting 1 week before quit date
set specific quit date within 2 weeks
take varenicline with food and full glass of water to minimize nausea
identify and avoid smoking triggers, plan substitutes such as gum, walking, deep breathing

follow_up.reason: smoking cessation follow-up, sooner if side effects develop
